Id1.text: Sandesh (confectionery) is a dish that can be served as a dessert. Another dish that is a dessert is Baked Alaska which has Christmas pudding as an ingredient.

Id2.text: Sandesh and Baked Alaska are desserts. Baked Alaska uses Christmas pudding as an ingredient.

Id3.text: Christmas pudding is an ingredient in Baked Alaska, which is a dessert, same as sandesh.
